Charles Barkley談Carmelo Anthony加入拓荒者： 球隊的後衛們會大量支配球權

而Charles Barkley似乎認為Carmelo Anthony和拓荒者的風格不太契合： “他必須從替補出發，他現在沒有選擇。有一點很有趣的是，拓荒者的後衛們會大量支配球權。”

Shaq插了一句：“所以他要當定點射手了，這不是他習慣的打法。”

Charles Barkley認同這個觀點：“謝謝Shaq。而且他現在的情況比之前更差。在休斯頓只有一個後衛在拿著球運運運運運運。而現在球隊有兩個後衛拿著球運阿運。再說一次，他之前的球隊有一名後衛在是運球運球運球運球運球運球運球，而現在有兩個人運球運球。” 不過最後Charles Barkley也表示為Carmelo Anthony感到高興。

He complained that taking a five-month hiatus was too long but it's for his own good. He has follow-up to the doctor next week. His friend LeBron James is also gonna be out of commission until his back heals. He's made slow but steady progress with his shooting since he injured his back. You can find out how ostentatious Floyd's lifestyle is on YouTube such as his car and house collections. He always wears ostentatious jewelery such as gold necklaces, rings and silver bracelets. He loves driving flashy cars and wearing flashy clothes. His elder brother is currently a head chef at a five star hotel and feels he's found his niche. His elder sister has also found her niche as a professor having worked as a researcher for three years. She sometimes naps at lunchtime because she has so much work to do that she feels drained. She usually snoozes on the sofa by the fireplace or at her desk when everybody else's eating lunch outside. She once brought her work along to the library where she dozed off at the table. Having a doze especially in front of the fire is a marvellous way to recharge your energy though. His younger brother has just completed his phd at Tokyo university and is on the way to becoming a professor. Japan is on the way to becoming the world's strongest economy. His younger sister is robust and healthy. She does lots of strength and conditioning exercise in her robust sneakers. After her gym session she usually has a cup of robust coffee and a glass of robust wine. She lives in korea where the economy and the political system are robust. His eldest brother has opened an antique shop which gave a positive impression on me. There's an exquisite antique that engages me. I bet the shop engages lots of passers-by. I formed a favourable impression of the store. His uncle has recently passed away at the age of ninety. I offer my sincere condolences to his uncle's family. His friend Jo said "my condolences on the loss of your uncle" His mum too sent her condolences to his family. His dad wrote "our condolences go to his family" By the way he hadnt heard from his cousin for years until yesterday when he received a call from her. They chatted in exquisite delight. She told him that there was a bully in her class so he told her not to engage with her. Just stay out it get way as much as possible. Di you remember the incident in Langham place where the escalator stopped and reversed direction at a speed three times as fast as normal causing people to fall and pile up at the base of the escalator? People were screaming as they tumbled down the escalator. Some people managed to grab the handrail and steady themselves. The incident occasioned a good deal of worry. When you were at secondary school were there any subjects which you weren't interested in and so didn't engage much in the classes? I remember I dusnt really engage in geography classes. I was often daydreaming. Today many students learn piano violin judo dancing Japanese and painting. I honestly don't know how they juggle these activities and schoolwork. Some of their parents have to go to work every day and so they found it hard to juggle a career with children. Perhaps they wanna kindle their kids' interests and see which one they can cultivate an interest in ir have a talent for. Sometimes I wonder if the children are truly enjoying their activities. LeBron loves video games. I remember him playing Counterstrike on YouTube where he used a gun to engage ninety nine enemies who only had knives lol.

「在這一年半的感受裡，就像過山車一樣起伏不定。所有事都在星期三開始，星期三有人打電話給我，然後我進行深思熟慮；星期四當天，我便作出了承諾，我願意為你們效力，我們真的很想讓此成真(Melo加盟球隊)，我目前也是可以打球的。到了星期五，他們(拓荒者)表示希望我能加盟，成為球隊一份子。」

「在這三四天沒有上陣的時間，讓我能夠重拾比賽的狀態。在情感上，我已經把自己從比賽中抽離，因此需要一點時間去讓自己清醒。當我接收到電話，我知道自己面臨著，如何把情感重新帶入比賽的挑戰。」

「你知道的，我總是留意著波特蘭，但以往時機都並不適合。但現在來看，這是一個完美的時機。在這幾年，我一直都與Damian Lillard聯絡，談論他與CJ McCollum的打法，與我過去四年的情況。我一直都尋找加盟這支球隊的機會，並表示我如何能幫助球隊。如果我們都能保持一致，有著同樣的步伐，我們將能取得成功。」

NBA「全三雙」第一人 占士：難以形容

【Now Sports-體育】洛杉磯湖人主場以112:107險勝雷霆，勒邦占士錄得對聯盟所有球隊都得到三雙的創舉，賽後，他感謝隊友和教練。

勒邦占士（LeBron James）在這場比賽取得25分、11個籃板和10個助攻，成為NBA史上面對聯盟所有球隊皆取得三雙的第一人，帶領紫金軍團站穩西岸一哥位置。「坦白說，我不知道如何回應，無法用言語形容。」

占士亦取得職業生涯第86次大三元，並謂：「過往所有三雙的成績，球隊都能贏波而回，因為這是最重要的。」

「我遇上很多優秀的隊友和教練，隊友為我製造機會，教練使我站在今日的位置，必須感謝他們，這數據很棒，很高興可以達到此成就。」占士大帝補充道。

On the day we set off I was waiting for him on the corner outside times square. He lives just around the corner so it only took him ten minutes to come. Meanwhile a pedestrian cane up to me and asked if there was any medical centre nearby as he had been ill with heatstroke. I told him that there were a clinic and a pharmacy just round the corner. As summer was just round the corner people suffered from heatstroke more easily. However there're lots of ways to prevent heatstroke during hot weather. At home sitting in a recliner or an armchair or on a sofa instead of in a chair or on a stool works wonders for your body. Moreover eating a balanced diet of veggies and fruits and a little meat does wonders for your health. Lastly exercise and meditation can do wonders for mind and body. We stayed in LeBron's mansion for a few nights. We were watching television in the living room while he was cooking in the kitchen. His elder brother had popped upstairs to get a book. His younger brother had just popped to the bank to get some cash while his sister had popped into a music store to get some saxophone scores. As he entered the living room I jumped out from behind the wall and yelled "boo!" It was absolutely hilarious because I was finally able to scare him successfully. Risa popped in and saw us later. Her boyfriend popped over and visited us a day later too. They're good company. Risa said she deserved a promotion but instead her colleague was given a promotion because her boss is biased towards her colleague. I said that's the way the cookie crumbles. Its water under the bridge. What's done is done. My brother too said it's no use crying over slit milk. What's done cannot be undone. Let bygones be bygones. Apparently her manager is also biased against her but in favour of her colleague. Oh well. She told me not to mention it when we're in company. By all means. Next week I'll pop over to her place to play her cornet. I prefer the company of musicians. Before she popped in she was browsing in zara. In the meantime I popped to the bank to open a bank account and went for a browse around a bookshop. I enjoy my own company and so does she. The residential estate LeBron lives in consists of houses rather than apartments. Each house has at least one retractable awning or canopy. The canopy could be made of cloth, steel, stainless steel, glass or concrete. In the front garden of his mansion, he planted a mango tree, a litchi tree, a chestnut oak, a black maple, two red maples and bushes in the lawn. Some of the bushes produce trumpet-shaped flowers. He also grew lots of flowers such as lavender, orchids, roses, violets, hydrangeas and sunflowers which are in full bloom. There're some exquisite flower pots placed near the lawn as decoration. He mows the grass from time to time. He hires a gardener to manicure his garden every now and then. His back garden is a meadow which is two thousand five hundred square foot in size. It used to be a lawn but he turned it into a meadow blanketed with wild flowers and exotic flowers. Some of the flower buds haven't opened yet but as the weather gets warmer the flowers open. Even inside his house he has a vase of hydrangeas and a few potted plants, some of which are just coming into bloom. Orchids can be cultivated in vases or in flowerpots. In the summer the meadow is covered with besurugup summer flowers. In the spring the meadow is blanketed in lovely spring flowers. In the fall it's a mass of pretty fall flowers. In the winter pretty winter flowers bloom in the meadow. It's an extraordinary garden. Every valentine's day LeBron buys his wife a bouquet of hydrangea, red roses and sunflowers. They're lovely cut flowers.
